violations.description: General employee practices. — --Food employee observed without proper hair restraint. Ensure employees working with food have or are provided with proper hair restraint.

Hot storage of potentially hazardous food. — --Hot food storage facilities/equipment was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining temperature of potentially hazardous food at 140F or greater. Meatballs in the hot hold unit on the prep line were temping at 120-125 degrees. Employee stated that they had been cooked 3 hours prior.

Variance requirement for specialized processing methods. — --Food establishment did not obtain approved variance or HACCP plan from regulatory authority for special process of Sous Viede or Vacuum sealing..

Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitize solution for mechanical warewashing machine was not maintained at the proper concentration. Sanitizer concentration for the dish machine behind the bar measured 0ppm at the time of inspection.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Walk-in cooler and walk-in freezer floor has food items and debris beneath the racking and needs to be cleaned.

Storage and handling of maintenance items. — --Wet-use maintenance items, such as mops, were not placed in a position that allows proper air-drying. Wet mops in the mop room stored on the floor and placed in a proper position to dry.
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Clean clothes, hair restraints, fingernail maint., jewelry, eating/drinking (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
